3235980.name: Banisher
3235980.description:
Banish the Demon
As a renowned ghost hunter, you travel to abandoned places around the world and try to destroy the evil that has destroyed the lives of many people. Demons live in these forgotten places, dangerous to anyone who disturbs their presence.

Evil in these places draws its life energy from cursed objects that were used in an occult ritual to resurrect the demon. Your task will be to destroy these objects and weaken the demon enough to defeat him.

WARNING! Demons can appear at any time and try to take your life!

Still something different
The quests to weaken the demon and the ritual process vary each time the game is launched depending on the type of demon and the location, ensuring that every game is different.

In addition, the behavior and aggressiveness of demons is varied depending on the player's playing style, the sequence of tasks and other aspects of the game.


As an experienced demon hunter you will try to:
    -Complete a series of assigned tasks to weaken the demon
    -Perform a ritual process based on hunting location
    -Destroy the demon soul
    -DON'T DIE!
